subject: Re:
body:
Thank you for the invitation to travel with you. Even though I travel so much, a private jet still holds the great joy of exclusivity and special occasion for me. My plans change all the time but at present am planning on an extended research trip here for a film I'm writing and will be heading back to Santa Fe to start my next acting project by the 13th or so. I hope this fits with your plans and we meet again soon. God bless and damn the torpedoes. Val
On Sep 22, 2007, at 5:55 PM, J. Epstein wrote:

> my number in new york is 212 750 9895, . I'll be going back and > forth to sata fe. keep in touch   Jeffrey
body_html:

I hope this fits with your plans and we meet again soon. God bless and damn the torpedoes. Val
